text:
There once was a boy named Leo who loved collecting seashells. Every outing to the beach turned into an adventure for Leo to find his shiny treasures. Once upon a time, Leo discovered a rare glittering pearl while wandering along the high tide line. Eagerly collecting it, he forgot about his usual finds.

That day felt different; the ocean seemed to sing under the sun. Friends weren't talking; they were all lost in their own thoughts. Leo felt melancholy seeing the sea life scattering.

After a while, Leo decided to trade his pearl for something far more valuable. That’s when he stumbled upon a tiny owl perched on a pebble. The owl cocked its head and twinkled a bright, wise eye. Leo realized this wasn’t a mere shell—it was a wise old creature.

The owl chirped, “How about a wish?” Feeling playful, he replied, “I wish for the ocean to always have music.”

The owl hooted softly and flew
